name: async_read_memory_array
description: Code should include a memory array with asynchronous read where the read operation occurs outside of a clocked always block, causing the memory to be inferred as $mem_v2
snippet: reg [3:0] m[60:0]; always @(posedge clk) begin y <= m[a]; m[a] <= w; end

name: combinational_multiplication
description: Code should include a combinational multiplication assignment that gets lowered to $macc_v2 after alumacc pass

name: keep_hierarchy_min_cost_command
description: Code should include the keep_hierarchy command with a -min_cost threshold for controlling hierarchy preservation based on cell cost estimation

name: memory_array_with_wide_address
description: Code should include a memory array accessed via a wide address input where the address width exceeds the memory depth, triggering $mem_v2 cost estimation
snippet: reg [3:0] m[60:0]; always @(posedge clk) begin y <= m[a]; m[a] <= w; end
